title: Simple Grass Blocks
description: This resource pack just makes the grass block textures simpler.
body:
# About
This resource pack just makes the grass block texture simpler. It makes the texture of them only grass, so the dirt will not be visible. There are already a lot of resource packs that do the same thing.

# Issues
If you have any issue, please tell me [here](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeujXb1cdvKFqFIIYTvhNUFTWjX7GEwSyfgtzPDsqO4C56-iQ/viewform?usp=header).
